default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and prepare for Marcel's upcoming webinar/workshop on using AI for content marketing and growth](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on showcasing real results and testimonials from past workshop attendees to build credibility](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Highlight that this approach goes beyond just creating content, but leverages AI to augment unique marketing skills](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Spend more time demoing the actual AI workflows and processes to intrigue attendees and drive workshop signups](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Mention flexible pricing options for individuals whose companies may not cover the cost](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)

## Topics

### Webinar Flow and Content
